title: Ștefan Cobeli

content:
Masterpieces are speaking for themselves. Intricate inaugural posts are tiresome.  Thus, we have two factors perfectly intertwining for just displaying a crumb of mathematical beauty : $$e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0.$$
Further Reading:  Kahn Academy’s lecture on Euler’s formula & Euler’s identity.
title: Inaugural Post
